location: Mt. Gelmir — on a corpse atop a raised wooden platform right beside the Craftsman's Shack Site of Grace

source.name: Corpse on shack platform, Craftsman's Shack

tactics: The corpse sits on the raised shed structure right next to the grace, just a short climb, no combat required
Craftsman's Shack is reached the long way around Mt. Gelmir's volcano rim, either from Seethewater Terminus or via the Ninth Mt. Gelmir Campsite side
Fires 3 bolts per trigger pull, so bring extra ammunition — you'll burn through bolts three times as fast as a normal crossbow
lore: A crossbow built around pulleys and power springs, an intricate mechanism that likely demanded both mathematical genius and knowledge of Golden Order fundamentalist teachings to construct.

builds.name: Burst status-bolt spammer
builds.why: Firing three bolts per shot triples the status procs (poison, bleed, frost) landed per trigger pull, good for fast status buildup at range
